intro: Hohenbergiopsis guatemalensis, commonly known as Guatemalan Hohenbergia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may aid in wound healing and the treatment of various infections. The bioactive constituents of Hohenbergiopsis guatemalensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties.
